name: Dirty Birdie
address: 2121 N Monroe St Suite 560, Monroe, MI 48162
about: Dirty Birdie is an indoor golf and axe throwing venue located in Monroe, Michigan. The facility features TrackMan technology for its golf simulators, providing players with advanced data and an immersive experience. It operates on a per-person hourly pricing model and offers a full-service bar and kitchen. The venue is designed for a casual, social atmosphere, making it suitable for groups looking for entertainment, practice, or events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology provides precise shot data and realistic ball flight
Relaxed environment with no strict dress code, making it accessible for casual players
On-site food and drink options, creating a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with a dedicated food menu available on-site
Full bar service available; no outside food or drinks permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan Range technology with advanced ball tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs, but we have sets available for use in each simulator bay (right and left adult clubs).

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. We offer a full food and beverage menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes average golfers 1 hour to play 18 holes per player (1/2 hour for 9 holes), 2 hours for 2 golfers, 3 hours for 3 golfers, and 4 hours for 4 golfers. This does not include warm-up time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with a casual atmosphere and activities suitable for families.
